ops.title: cc-guides v3 canonical architecture — framework (binary+GHA) in cc-guides, content (guides/ + fleet.json + fan-out) in cc-skills, per-repo .claude/fragments layouts; live fleet-wide 2026-07-10
ops.body:
cc-guides v3 shipped 2026-07-10, whole fleet migrated (21/21, clean-clone verified). Split: **cc-guides** = Go binary (brew `yasyf/tap/cc-guides`, auto-release `v0.1.<run#>` per main push, releases immutable — v0.1.1–0.1.8 embed-era binaries keep old banners green forever, v3 = v0.1.9+) + importable GHA (`yasyf/cc-guides@action-v1`, reusable `re-render.yml`). **cc-skills** = content home: `guides/md|sh/` shared fragments, `fleet.json` roster, `guides-fan-out.yml` (push on `guides/**` → `cc-guides lint` gate → `repository_dispatch cc-guides-render` fleet-wide; secret `FLEET_DISPATCH_TOKEN`). Binary releases dispatch nothing.

Per-repo: `.claude/fragments/<target-path>/` with `layout.toml` — `fragments = [...]` FIRST (local names / `cc-skills:name` imports / `{ use, args }` inline tables), `[sources.*]` LAST or absent (baked default `github:yasyf/cc-skills//guides@main`). Banner v2 self-pins (`fragments=<alias>@<sha12>`); `check` reproduces per-banner, so old pins verify forever. Re-render commit gate is whole-diff: banner-only files ride along in content commits; all-banner-only diffs skip.

**How to apply:** shared edit → cc-skills `guides/` push (fan-out handles the fleet); repo edit → fragments + `cc-guides render` + one commit (see [[cc-guides-generated-claude-md]]); new repo → add to cc-skills `fleet.json` or it only gets the weekly belt. Durable detail + deferred list: cc-notes note `2c555db` in ~/Code/cc-context. Deferred as of 2026-07-10: cc-skills self-migration (`cc-guides init`, after repo-bootstrap v0.40.0 lands) + joining fleet.json; repo-bootstrap v0.41.0 layout scaffold; legacy `init` deletion; cc-context install-binary adoption; fleet go 1.26.5 bump (cc-review at 1.26.4) + setup-go `check-latest`; guard hooks live in cc-context plugin 0.9.0. Related: [[go-release-canonical-architecture]], [[plugin-cache-keys-on-version]].
